title: Garlicky Wok-Seared Ukrainian Garlic Hash
description: A sweet and savory Ukrainian dish featuring crispy garlic, wok-hei, and a hint of agave sweetness.
instructions: Heat a wok over high heat until smoky and coated with a fine layer of oil.
Add 2 tablespoons of agave nectar to the wok and stir until dissolved.
Add 1 large onion, thinly sliced, to the wok and stir-fry until caramelized and slightly charred.
Add 3-4 cloves of minced garlic to the wok and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
